name: AWS CloudTrail Event Query
description: Query AWS CloudTrail for historical API events — who did what, when, and from where — with actor, resource, time, and error-code filtering.

parameters.name: event_source
parameters.description: AWS service source e.g. ec2.amazonaws.com, s3.amazonaws.com — empty for any service

parameters.name: event_name
parameters.description: CloudTrail API event name e.g. StopInstances, DeleteBucket — ONE event per step

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: IAM username or ARN who performed the action — empty for any user

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD — derive from query or default to 30 days ago

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: YYYY-MM-DD — derive from query or default to today

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: AWS region — empty for all regions

parameters.name: resource_name
parameters.description: specific resource name to filter events — empty for all

parameters.name: resource_type
parameters.description: resource type e.g. AWS::EC2::Instance — empty for all

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: source IP address filter — empty for all IPs

parameters.name: error_code
parameters.description: error code for failed events e.g. AccessDenied — empty for all

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: AWS profile name from Cloud Profile context
